subject: WM-0126 review: verified
body: No blocking findings in second review. Report and matrix now make WM-0126 integrable as a verified stop-sign evidence artifact while keeping M8 closeout and WM-0127 readiness blocked pending a dedicated performance repair/explanation task; bench remains recorded as two FAIL runs; Web demo-only, Windows unsigned controlled external test, owner gates, and forbidden-path boundaries preserved.
